name: Priority
description_short: This is not a financial services company—the website is Merriam-Webster's dictionary definition of the word 'priority.' No financial products or services are offered.
description_long: The page contains only lexicographic content: the word's definition, synonyms, pronunciation guide, usage examples, word history dating to the 15th century, and related phrases. There is no company information, no financial products, no loan offerings, no application process, and no contact details for any lending organization. The content is purely educational and definitional in nature. This appears to be a data entry error where a dictionary URL was mistakenly assigned to a company profile in the payday-alternatives category. Without access to the actual Priority financial services website, it is impossible to accurately assess their products, services, rates, or business model. The current profile cannot be completed with factual information because the provided source material contains zero financial services information.
